message:
feat(content_dedup): add operational telemetry counters to DedupEngine [ft-3kxe.32]

Plain u64 counters for segments_processed, segments_deduplicated,
segments_inserted, segments_inline, releases, gc_runs. Outcome sum
invariant: inserted + deduplicated + inline = processed.
12 tests (8 unit + 4 property).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
